Variables.Name: IdeaMaterialDiffuse
Variables.Description: When baking, use this diffuse calculate reflection fro sun related lighting, not use really material's diffuse texture

Variables.Name: LightmapBoost
Variables.Description: Scales the lightmap result of idea baking.

Variables.Name: SunIntensity
Variables.Description:
By luciuszhang:
	 Control the sun intensity from the sky, unit is cdm^2, default value is 1.0.

Variables.Name: DiscardPixelFrontfaceFactor
Variables.Description:
When ray intersected surface frontface counter lower DiscardPixelFrontfaceFactor  NumRays, the pixel will be discard. Larger value will help decrease black edge artifact.
	 But if scene has two side surface(like flags), will cause another artifact, pixels behind back side of flags maybe discarded wrong.

Variables.Name: LocalLightsAffectMaxDistance
Variables.Description:
By luciuszhang:
	 Control the sun indirect intensity from the sky, unit is cdm^2, default value is 1.0.
